knownIssues.title: 3840×3744 per eye is one of the most demanding resolutions in consumer VR
knownIssues.description: Even a flagship GPU will struggle without foveated rendering. Most VR titles were not designed for this resolution and must be run at reduced SteamVR render scale.
knownIssues.workaround: Always run foveated rendering. Set SteamVR render resolution to 60-70% for non-Varjo-native titles. Varjo-native OpenXR apps leverage the resolution better.

knownIssues.title: Mixed-reality features require enterprise license (Focal Edition)
knownIssues.description: The XR-4 ships in consumer VR configuration by default. High-quality video passthrough / MR requires the Focal Edition hardware + license, which is enterprise-gated.
knownIssues.workaround: Standard XR-4 is a strong consumer VR headset. For MR workflows, contact Varjo about Focal Edition upgrade.

knownIssues.title: Dual-cable harness is heavy — mount a ceiling pulley for active use
knownIssues.description: The combined DisplayPort + USB-C cable assembly is physically heavier than single-cable headsets; active play without cable management can cause neck strain or headset shift.
knownIssues.workaround: Ceiling-mounted cable pulley or over-the-shoulder clip. Most lighthouse-tracked users already run one for Index/Vive.

optimizationTips.tip: Foveated rendering is MANDATORY for acceptable performance
optimizationTips.simpleExplanation: At 3840×3744 per eye, no GPU on the market can brute-force this resolution at 90 FPS without foveated rendering.
optimizationTips.advancedExplanation: Varjo Base → Display → Foveated Rendering → Dynamic (strong). This reduces effective shading rate by 50-60% in the periphery. Combined with eye calibration it's imperceptible during actual gameplay.

optimizationTips.tip: Prefer Varjo's OpenXR runtime over SteamVR
optimizationTips.simpleExplanation: Varjo's native OpenXR runtime bypasses SteamVR entirely and is optimized for foveated rendering.
optimizationTips.advancedExplanation: Varjo Base → General → Set as default OpenXR runtime. Native OpenXR titles (MSFS 2024, DCS, iRacing) see 20-30% higher performance vs going through SteamVR's OpenXR layer.

optimizationTips.tip: Consider upscaling via OpenXR Toolkit as an additive
optimizationTips.simpleExplanation: OpenXR Toolkit adds FSR/NIS upscaling on top of foveated rendering. Stacks multiplicatively.
optimizationTips.advancedExplanation: Install OpenXR Toolkit → FSR Performance + Dynamic FR combined can reclaim 70%+ of the GPU headroom needed to hit 90 FPS at near-native XR-4 fidelity.
